name: heist-deck-compendium
description: Duskwall Heist Deck — Foundry VTT module build scripts

scripts.compile: fvtt package pack -n people --in packs/src/people --out packs && fvtt package pack -n treasures --in packs/src/treasures --out packs && fvtt package pack -n obstacles --in packs/src/obstacles --out packs && fvtt package pack -n heist-tables --in packs/src/heist-tables --out packs
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run compile
